task_completion.description: Navigate to the issue categories configuration page for the 'Office Renovation' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing the project settings or issue categories list specifically for the 'Office Renovation' project.

task_completion.description: Delete the 'Plumbing' category and reassign its issues to the 'MEP' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent deleting the 'Plumbing' category and selecting 'MEP' from a reassignment dropdown, or bulk-editing 'Plumbing' issues to change their category to 'MEP' before deletion.

task_completion.description: Delete the 'Electrical' category and reassign its issues to the 'MEP' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent deleting the 'Electrical' category and selecting 'MEP' from a reassignment dropdown, or bulk-editing 'Electrical' issues to change their category to 'MEP' before deletion.

task_completion.description: Ensure 'Plumbing' and 'Electrical' categories are completely removed from the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the final issue categories list show that 'Plumbing' and 'Electrical' are no longer present, while 'MEP' remains.

task_completion.description: Verify that the previous tickets are preserved and now categorized under 'MEP'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the issues list or category summary show existing utility tickets are now assigned to the 'MEP' category, confirming no issues were lost during deletion.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to perform the category consolidation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser and the issue tracker's UI (clicks, dropdowns, forms) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual issue tracking application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to a real issue tracking system (e.g., Redmine, Jira, GitLab) and not a mocked text file, local HTML edit, or spreadsheet.

integrity.description: The agent reassigned existing issues rather than deleting them and creating new ones from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used bulk edit or category deletion reassignment features. There is no evidence of the agent manually typing out new tickets to replace the old ones.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Identifier: 'office-renovation'. Target Category for reassignment: 'MEP'. Categories to be removed: 'Plumbing' and 'Electrical'.
